name: default-ai-engineering-stack
description: The framework needs no external tools to run. The only optional one is Semgrep, the security-scan gate in the Verify step. Spec / Loop / Memory are implemented by the framework's own Markdown templates and the AI agent.

verify.why: Invoked by execute_request.py as the security-scan gate. Optional: if it is not installed, the scan is reported as skipped (not a failure) and everything else still works.
